# Cerveau.dev

> Multi-brain system for Claude Code. One protocol, many projects, zero duplication.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://cerveau.dev/getting-started/installation.html)
- [Quick Start](https://cerveau.dev/getting-started/quick-start.html)
- [First Brain](https://cerveau.dev/getting-started/first-brain.html)
- [Features](https://cerveau.dev/getting-started/features.html)
